category_sources: source_facts.description says compressed read-only file system for Linux; official GitHub README says this is the official Squashfs-tools repository for tools to create and extract Squashfs filesystems.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading says Welcome to Squashfs-tools; repository name is squashfs-tools while Homebrew formula is squashfs.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README directs users to Documentation/4.7.5/README.md and Documentation/4.7.5/INSTALL.md and explains the Documentation directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/plougher/squashfs-tools; per instruction repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a compressed read-only Linux filesystem; official GitHub topics include linux, compression, filesystem, archiving, squashfs, and mksquashfs.
